form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 12 over 320m at this track behind Lizzy Bonkers beaten 9 lengths (19.13) in a Grade 5. Happy to overlook recent efforts. Well placed and gets chance to find best.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (19.47) when eighth over 320m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two places from three starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.
